title: Opus 4.8 vs GPT 5.6 Sol - Mobile AAB
effort: Both artifacts complete; both token counts captured
headline: GPT 5.6 Sol leads the preliminary objective artifact audit 96-91; both contenders produced signed, locally verified Android App Bundles. Build-phase new tokens were ~432,615 (Opus) vs 285,373 (GPT) — same order of magnitude across two different harnesses, so no clean token-efficiency winner is claimed.
